completed_tasks.name: Client Feedback Copy and Month Gallery

remaining_tasks.name: Choose selective rotor integration or formal deferral
Run paused screenshot and physical-device review
Resolve licensing, provenance, accuracy, and subject-matter gates

blockers.description: Rotor integration or deferral requires a product decision.
blockers.workaround: Record integrate or defer before changing the app.

human_actions_pending.action: Approve Phase 5 integration or formal deferral
Review final screenshots and physical-device behavior

decisions.decision: Keep the isolated rotor out of the accepted app until Phase 5 is decided.
decisions.rationale: A selective decision is safer than merging a competing prototype wholesale.

decisions.decision: Keep generated agent runtimes local and reproducible.
decisions.rationale: The public handoff needs project documentation, not machine-specific runtime output.
The parent main branch remains the shared deployment boundary.

next_action: Read README.md and the Phase 5 plan, run npm run test:flow and npm run build, then record integrate or defer before changing runtime code.
context_notes: The prototype through Phase 4 is working. Public handoff hygiene is complete. Final screenshots, the Phase 5 rotor decision, and production legal/editorial review remain.
